name: 47 - Wf Telegram Inbound Polling getUpdates TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
READY IMPORT — active=false. Schedule Trigger disabled/test-only. No Telegram Trigger. No public webhook.

Gate E store derivation: open_decision_ids derived from control_plane_decisions_test (status=open); Collapse load fan-out before Build (runOnceForAllItems). No hardcoded open_decision_ids_test_only.

Wg48 handoff: Set Wf47 UI config enable_wg48_handoff=false (default). When false, IF short-circuits before Execute Workflow. Phase 2: set true only for test window + wire CONFIGURE_48_WORKFLOW_REFERENCE_IN_N8N_UI on Execute Workflow node (no hardcoded workflow id in Git).

Prereq: wf47_polling_state_test + control_plane_decisions_test seeded. Token/chat_id in n8n UI only.

nodes.name: Collapse shared decisions load fan-out (1 item per run)
Data Table - Load wf47 polling state
Data Table - Upsert wf47 state row

parameters.jsCode:
// Read-only inspect — contract fields plus four sanitized callback-ack fields only.
const d = $input.item.json;
return {
  json: {
    inspect_status: d.inspect_status,
    decision_id: d.decision_id || null,
    selected_option: d.selected_option || null,
    update_id: d.update_id ?? null,
    duplicate_or_stale: d.duplicate_or_stale || false,
    note_present: d.note_present || false,
    block_reason: d.block_reason || null,
    allowed_chat_configured: d.allowed_chat_configured === true,
    offset_after_placeholder: d.offset_after_placeholder ?? null,
    last_handled_update_id: d.last_handled_update_id ?? null,
    callback_ack_applicable: d.callback_ack_applicable === true,
    callback_ack_attempted: d.callback_ack_attempted === true,
    callback_ack_ok: d.callback_ack_attempted ? d.callback_ack_ok === true : null,
    callback_ack_block_reason: d.callback_ack_block_reason ?? (d.callback_ack_applicable ? null : 'not_applicable'),
    open_decision_ids_source: d.open_decision_ids_source || null,
    store_derivation_bypassed: d.store_derivation_bypassed === true,
    open_decision_ids_count: d.open_decision_ids_count ?? null,
    test_only: true
  }
};

parameters.content:
TABLES: wf47_polling_state_test + control_plane_decisions_test
Polling rows: last_update_id | last_handled_update_id | handled_keys_json
Store: derive open_decision_ids where status=open (deduped Set).
Pattern from repo: workflows/42 + wf45 Collapse load fan-out.
